headline: Abbvie acquiring Apogee for $10.9B, Coca-Cola vs. IRS in appeals court
summary: Yahoo Finance Senior Reporter Brooke DiPalma joins Josh Lipton in highlighting the day's biggest stories and stock moves, including AbbVie's (ABBV) $10.9 billion acquisition of Apogee Therapeutics (APGE) and Coca-Cola's (KO) latest legal showdown with the IRS in US appeals court.

headline: Dow Jones opens higher but Nasdaq flat as hawkish Fed still looms
summary: 9.55am: Dow up but Nasdaq flat US stocks were showing a familiar split in opening trades, with the Dow Jones opening up 0.5% as investors rotate into cyclical and defensive blue chips including JPMorgan, Goldman Sachs, Caterpillar, UnitedHealth and Amgen. The S&P 500 climbed just over...

headline: Less Volume, More Premium: Post-Ozempic Economics Are Killing The Quantity Model
summary: As millions take GLP-1 drugs, packaged food giants face declining volumes while protein brands and specialty grocers win.
